violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable chopper) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC moved to ware washing area for washing and sanitizing Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

(Milk) was observed held at (48) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
Inspector observed several items being stored on the slicer. PIC removed items during inspection and is to sanitize unit before use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC voluntarily disposed of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

(Enchilada Salsa ), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of salsa. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC), (Enchilada salsa ) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep.PIC informed of proper cooling methods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the (kitchen). New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener blade and base, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food debris and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine to be taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024
Employees cell phone was observed on food preparation table. Staff moved phone to personal belongings during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024
Employees phone charger was observed on the meat slicer. Personal items shall be store in designated areas and not on food contact surface areas. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023
Food Items were observed stored on the floor in the freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
The walls in the back storage area behind shelves area is in poor repair(observed a hole). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
